# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment documents generated for the latest versioned eShopOnWeb report. Use the links below as a navigation entry point into the architecture, configuration, data, dependency, API, and workflow findings.

## Supplementary Documents

- [architecture-diagram.md](architecture-diagram.md) - Two-layer diagrams for the application architecture and major component relationships.
- [dependency-map.md](dependency-map.md) - Categorized view of declared solution dependencies and test libraries.
- [api-service-contracts.md](api-service-contracts.md) - Inventory of services, endpoints, DTOs, communication patterns, and sequence flow.
- [data-architecture.md](data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity relationships, repository usage, and data sensitivity summary.
- [configuration-inventory.md](configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, properties, secrets handling, and runtime versions.
- [business-workflows.md](business-workflows.md) - Domain entities, core storefront and admin workflows, and business-rule sequence flow.
